description: Croissant components for CIViC that could not be completed from crawled pages alone.

items.reason: No explicit dataset launch date found on any crawled page. The original CIViC paper was published in 2017 (PMID 28138153) but the database predates the publication. The validator recommends this field.
items.how_to_complete: Check the CIViC GitHub repository or contact the CIViC team to determine the original public launch date of the database.

items.reason: No RRID (Research Resource Identifier) was found on any crawled page from the civicdb.org or docs.civicdb.org domains.
items.how_to_complete: Search the RRID portal (scicrunch.org/resources) for 'CIViC' to find the RRID, or check with the CIViC team.

items.reason: No formal temporal coverage statement found on any crawled page. The dataset covers cancer variant evidence from literature spanning decades.
items.how_to_complete: Determine the earliest publication year represented in the evidence items (available via the GraphQL API) to establish the start of coverage.

items.reason: The nightly release includes additional files not present in the monthly release: AcceptedAndSubmittedAssertionSummaries.tsv and AcceptedAndSubmittedVariantsVcf. These files exist only in the nightly build. Their checksums change nightly so a stable MD5 cannot be recorded.
items.how_to_complete: Headers can be extracted from https://civicdb.org/downloads/nightly/nightly-AcceptedAndSubmittedAssertionSummaries.tsv and the nightly VCF. Checksums would need to be re-computed at download time.
